settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your Snow Media Center experience

contentBar.title: Content Bar
contentBar.description: Shows trending Plex titles and live sports on the home screen. Turn off on slower devices for a smoother experience.

player.title: Player (Live TV)
player.description: Global kill-switch for the Player section (Live TV, Movies & Series). When off, the Player card is hidden on every device.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the app language. Translation coverage is still being expanded.
